title: grossularia roezlii var. pubescens
intro: Grossularia roezlii var. pubescens, also known as the hairy bearberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the family Ericaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Grossularia roezlii var. pubescens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and berries can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
